blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw, staging, and target compliance schemas, OPTIONS statement

DATA step applying five regulatory validation rules to financial transactions: CTR threshold (R001), structuring detection (R002), KYC completeness (R003), high-risk country EDD (R004), and dormant account activity (R005) with violation flagging and multiple OUTPUT statements

PROC SQL cross-referencing validated violations against sanctions list and regulation lookup tables to enrich with sanction type, sanctioning body, regulation name, penalty range, and reporting deadlines
DATA step categorizing violations by severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) based on sanction status, violation type, and transaction amount, with priority scoring and escalation deadline calculation
PROC FREQ generating cross-tabulation of severity by violation code and severity frequency counts with output datasets for violation summary reporting
DATA step generating remediation action records: assigns specific compliance actions (CTR filing, SAR review, KYC verification, EDD review) and responsible teams based on violation code
TITLE statement and PROC PRINT generating compliance exceptions report for CRITICAL and HIGH severity violations with formatted labels and dollar amounts
